meaning: n.外套,(动物的)皮毛,(植物的)表皮,(漆等的)层,涂层vt.涂上,包上
examples: I wondered whose the coat was.
Here, let me take your coat.
She was wearing a new coat.
For example, a fur coat, original artwork, or comic book collection are not investments.
The idea is to coat the tin material onto the copper component that conducts electricity.
